title: NestJS: Data Validation and Transformation
subtitle: This report summarizes data validation and transformation techniques in NestJS, a framework for building Node.js server-side applications.
excerpt: This report summarizes data validation and transformation techniques in NestJS, a framework for building Node.js server-side applications.

content.html: This report summarizes data validation and transformation techniques in NestJS, a framework for building Node.js server-side applications.
Validating data ensures it adheres to predefined rules before reaching the controller layer. This prevents issues like:

Incorrect or Malicious Data: Protects against attacks like SQL injection and unexpected data types.
Errors and Exceptions: Prevents errors caused by invalid data formats.

Improved Data Integrity: Guarantees data adheres to defined rules.
Reduced Errors: Prevents issues caused by invalid data.
Cleaner Code: Separates data validation logic from controllers.

content.text: Check validation of DTO and input data before controller.

content.code: import { NestFactory } from '@nestjs/core';import { AppModule } from './app.module';import { ValidationPipe } from '@nestjs/common';async function bootstrap() {  const app = await NestFactory.create(AppModule);  app.useGlobalPipes(new ValidationPipe());  await app.listen(3000);}bootstrap();
import { IsNotEmpty } from 'class-validator';export class CreateTaskDto {  @IsNotEmpty()  title: string;  @IsNotEmpty()  description: string;}

getTaskById(id: string): Task {    const found = this.tasks.find((task) => task.id === id);    if (!found) {      throw new NotFoundException(`Task with ID "${id}" not found`);    }    return found;  }

content.text: Check ID exists when the element was deleted

content.code: deleteTask(id: string): void {    const found = this.getTaskById(id);    this.tasks = this.tasks.filter((task) => task.id !== found.id);  }

content.text: Check ID exists when the element was updated

content.code: updateTaskStatus(id: string, status: TaskStatus): Task {    const task = this.getTaskById(id);    task.status = status;    return task;  }
import { IsEnum } from 'class-validator';import { TaskStatus } from '../tasks.model';export class UpdateTaskStatus {  @IsEnum(TaskStatus)  status: TaskStatus;}

@Patch('/:id/status')  updateTaskStatus(    @Param('id') id: string,    @Body() updateTaskStatusDto: UpdateTaskStatusDto,  ): Task {    const { status } = updateTaskStatusDto;    return this.tasksService.updateTaskStatus(id, status);  }

import { IsEnum, IsOptional, IsString } from 'class-validator';import { TaskStatus } from '../tasks.model';export class GetTasksFilterDto {  @IsOptional()  @IsEnum(TaskStatus)  status?: TaskStatus;  @IsOptional()  @IsString()  search?: string;}
